message.content:
@startuml
title orderList表示

actor "配達員" as User1 at top left
participant Courieridform.jsp as JSP1 #D3E5F8#04679B
participant OrderListServlet as Servlet #FFC2A9#CC6600
participant CourierDAO as DAO_Courier #FFEFD5#CDAA7D
participant Courier as Model_Courier #FFFACD#DAEEAD
participant Session as Sess #FAEBD7#DEB887
participant OrderDAO as DAO_Order #FFFFE0#EEE8AA
participant Order as Model_Order #DCDCDC#FFFFFF
participant DetailDAO as DAO_Detail #ADD8E6#00CED1
participant Detail as Model_Detail #AFEEEE#DB7093
participant Request as Req #DDA0DD#BA55D3
participant orderedlist.jsp as JSP2 #D3E5F8#04679B
actor "配達員" as User2 at bottom right


User1 -> JSP1 : courierID入力\n(緑色矢印)
JSP1 --> Servlet : リンク
activate Servlet
    note over Servlet: findByCourierId() 呼び出し
    
    activate DAO_Courier 
        DAO_Courier ->> Model_Courier : 生成
        
        return Model_Courier to Servlet  
        
    deactivate DAO_Courier 
    
    rect rgb(240,240,240)    
      alt セッションに存在しない場合のみ実行される処理
          Servlet ->> Sess : setAttribute(Courier)\nセッション保存          
      end      
    endrect    
    
    note over Servlet: findAll() 呼び出し
    
    activate DAO_Order   
       DAO_Order->Model_Order: 生成       
           
           loop for each(Order o in list){\n   findById(o.getId())}            
               DAO_Order-->DAO_Detail:findByOrderId()\n注文詳細取得               
                activate DAO_Detail                
                    DAO_Detail-->>Model_Detail:list作成                    
                   return ArrayList<Detail>\nto DAO_Order                   
                 deactivate DAO_Detail                 
                  DAO_Order->Model_Oder:setDetails(ArrayList<detail>)              
            endloop
            
         return ArrayList<Order>\nto Servlet         
     deactivate DAO_Order     
             
             Servlet->Req:setAttribute(\nArrayList<Order>)             
     
deactivate Servlet 

Rectangle "" {
note over Servlet,JSP2:#fefece|フォワード
}



return JSP2toUser2:\n表示




@enduml
